kessler_in.say: ARTIE. Big news. No news. Same news. Trivia Night's tonight and I am a WEAPON.
Kessler, the door was locked. I heard it lock. I locked it AT you.
And yet. Here I am. Do you have any bread? A dense bread? A rye, say?

look.text: A closet containing one coat you like and one you cannot look at directly.

take.text: You retrieve the gauche jacket, holding it at arm's length like a confession.

look.text: One bent umbrella, permanently open, standing in the stand like a small defeated ghost.

take.text: You take the umbrella. It does not close. It never closes. It is a lifestyle now.

look.text: Bills, a menu, and a postcard from a cousin you've been successfully avoiding.
A drift of unopened mail on the table. Something crinkles in there — a receipt, maybe. You never file, you accumulate.

take.text: You dig out the crumpled receipt for the jacket. Proof. POWER.
The rest is bills, and bills can wait until they're threats.

look.text: A desk that has given up. Somewhere in the strata: a click pen of unusual satisfaction.

take.text: You pocket the click pen. Click. Click. Click. A tiny fountain of pointless joy.

look.text: A couch that has surrendered its treasure. Just crumbs and one alarming spring now.
A couch of great depth, geological in its layering. Coins live in couches. This is known.

use.text: You mine the cushions and surface with a dollar in loose change and a cough drop you choose not to examine.
You've strip-mined it. There is nothing left but the spring, and the spring has plans for you.

look.text: A show about four people arguing about nothing. You watch it like a mirror.

use.text: You turn it on. It's the one where the tall idiot bursts in. You turn it off. Too real.

look.text: Sol, comedian, owner of this apartment and the moral high ground he never actually uses. He is watching your scheme with the calm of a man who will do a bit about it later.

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: "You want me to hold the ugly jacket. No. That jacket is a decision, Artie, and you have to live in it or return it."

exits.name: the front door
exits.look: Out into the world, where the tab and the trivia and the jacket all live.
